## Motivation

What workflow, scientific use case, or developer pain point would this improve?

## Proposal

Describe the expected behavior and any alternatives you considered.

## Scientific or Reproducibility Impact

Note whether the change affects benchmark protocols, result formats, datasets,
force-field settings, or published figures/tables.
